text.title: react-patterns Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure: brief → folder tree → components → context → state routing → validate.

step.name: expand-folder-tree
step.action: Emit src/features/<feature_name>/ with the canonical sub-tree (components/, hooks/, api.ts, types.ts) and any feature-specific files.

step.name: declare-components
step.input: List of UI components the feature needs.
step.action: For each: pick a PascalCase name, define <Name>Props interface, set declaration="function-declaration".
step.decision-gate: Reject any component with declaration="named-const-arrow" unless paired with a justification field naming the React.forwardRef use case.

step.name: decide-context
step.input: Does the feature need to share state across ≥ 3 component levels?
step.action: If yes: declare context with null_sentinel=true, value_memoized=true, consumer_hook="use<Feature>". If no: context = null.

step.name: route-state
step.input: List of state slices from the feature brief.
step.action: For each slice, pick layer ∈ {server, form, global-ui, local, shared-context} per the decision tree.
step.decision-gate: Reject duplicate slice names; reject "shared-context" entries when global-ui store already owns the slice.
